prompts.intro: You have just joined a new sports club. Write an email to your English friend Sam.
bullets: invite Sam to come with you
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Sam,

I have joined a football club near my house. I joined because I want to get fit and meet new friends. The training is on Saturday mornings.

Would you like to come with me next week? It is really fun!

See you soon,
Alex

prompts.intro: You went to a school trip last week. Write an email to your English friend Jamie.
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Jamie,

Last week my class went to the science museum in the city. We saw many interesting machines and did some experiments. I liked the space exhibition best because the photos of planets were amazing.

Wish you were there!

Best,
Mia

prompts.intro: You want to organise a picnic with your friends. Write an email to your English friend Taylor.
bullets: when and where you want to have the picnic
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Taylor,

I want to organise a picnic in the park on Saturday afternoon. Can you bring some sandwiches and juice? I will make a salad.

We can play games and listen to music. Please ask your brother to come too!

See you soon,
Rio

prompts.intro: You started learning a new hobby. Write an email to your English friend Jordan.
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Jordan,

I have started learning to play the guitar! My uncle gave me his old guitar and now I take lessons every Thursday. It is difficult but very exciting.

Do you have any hobbies? I would love to know!

Best wishes,
Sofia

prompts.intro: You are going to a birthday party next weekend. Write an email to your English friend Casey.
bullets: what you are going to do at the party
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Casey,

My friend Pablo is having a birthday party on Saturday. We are going to eat pizza, watch a film and play music. It will be at his house from 5 pm.

Would you like to come? Everyone is welcome!

See you,
Lena

prompts.intro: You recently read a great book. Write an email to your English friend Morgan.
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Morgan,

I just finished a book called 'The Lost Island'. It is about two teenagers who find a secret island during their summer holiday. I loved it because it was very exciting and funny.

You should read it! I think you will enjoy it.

Take care,
Nia

prompts.intro: You are going on a school trip abroad next month. Write an email to your English friend Riley.
bullets: how long you will be away
what you are looking forward to
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Riley,

I am going on a school trip to Paris next month! We will be away for four days. I am really looking forward to seeing the Eiffel Tower and trying French food.

I will send you photos!

Bye for now,
Kai

prompts.intro: You saw a great film last night. Write an email to your English friend Avery.
bullets: ask Avery to watch it too
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Avery,

I watched a fantastic film last night with my sister. It was a comedy about a group of students who start a band. We laughed a lot!

You should watch it this weekend. I am sure you will love it.

Best,
Pia

prompts.intro: Your school has a new computer room. Write an email to your English friend Dakota.
bullets: what is new in the room
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Dakota,

Our school just opened a new computer room with 30 fast computers and a big screen. Students use it for research and also to learn to code. I think it is really useful and it is much better than our old one.

Do you have something like this at your school?

Write back soon,
Sam

prompts.intro: You are helping to organise a school fair. Write an email to your English friend Remy.
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Remy,

Our school fair is on the 15th of next month. There will be food stalls, games and a talent show. It starts at 10 am and finishes at 4 pm.

Would you like to help us prepare? We need more people to work at the food stall.

Hope to see you there,
Blake
